indicators.name: large open space
indicators.rationale: The large open space lacks privacy and acoustic enclosure, making it unsuitable for sleep.

indicators.name: high ceiling with exposed beams
indicators.rationale: High ceiling with exposed beams creates a noisy and visually distracting environment.

indicators.name: concrete walls and floor
indicators.rationale: Concrete surfaces are hard and cold, making them unsuitable for sleeping.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is not suitable for sleep (primary). The large open space, high ceiling with exposed beams, and hard concrete surfaces all contribute to an unsuitable environment for sleep.
